working_on: Fix Issue #9 (one-line column swap in check_target.py:114, version → name) to unblock P5-01a; mark P5-01a complete; fix Issue #10 (boot-time worktree-staleness check) found in-band per no-cascade direction; complete label-taxonomy work (procedures for documentation/question, drop community labels, fix scan_issue_backlog.py boot surface).
declared_scope: Three coupled work units. (A) Issue #9 fix: change engine/tools/check_target.py:114 from 'WHERE version = %s' to 'WHERE name = %s'; add regression test in engine/tools/test_check_target.py asserting SQL uses name column; run check_target.py --task-id P5-01a to verify both criteria PASS; mark P5-01a complete in engine/session/auto_target.json (status field only); close Issue #9. (B) Issue #10 fix (in-session per no-cascade direction): add worktree-staleness check to engine/tools/hooks/session-start.sh that runs git fetch + compares HEAD to origin/main and surfaces a LOUD attention block when behind; close Issue #10. (C) Label optimization: add documentation and question labels to issue-discipline.md taxonomy + reactive-only labels section + CLAUDE.md fix-in-context list; drop 'good first issue' and 'help wanted' via gh label delete; rewrite engine/tools/scan_issue_backlog.py format_fyi_line to emit 7 type categories (subtracting upstream-bugs from bug count and surfacing upstream separately) with regression tests in test_scan_issue_backlog.py; append ADR 0048 Consequences amendment; update issue-discipline.md FYI line example. End state: P5-01a complete, Issues #9 and #10 closed, label taxonomy reflects intended use, boot surface counts accurately.
outcome_summary: Three deliverables landed: (A) Issue #9 column-swap fix (check_target.py:114 version→name) + regression test + P5-01a flipped to complete in auto_target.json; routine resumes. (B) Issue #10 boot-staleness check added to session-start.sh after the bug surfaced at this session's own boot (worktree saw stale register_state.json because origin/main had S-0050's close commit but the worktree's local HEAD lagged); filed Issue #10 then fixed in same session per user direction 'no more session cascade.' (C) Label taxonomy extended (documentation/question added with procedures; reactive-only labels section authored; community labels dropped via gh label delete) + scan_issue_backlog.py boot surface corrected (emits 7 type categories instead of 4; subtracts upstream-bugs from bug count, surfaces upstream separately) + ADR 0048 Consequences amendment + 3 new tests. Pytest 580/580 (was 576). Validate clean. Boot surface verified: '0 bugs ... (0 urgent; 2 upstream-blocked).' Backlog 3 → 0 in-project actionable. Two memories saved: feedback_no_session_cascade.md (in-band bug + understood fix → fix here AND file Issue), and the existing pushback rule reinforced. Cadence-overdue flag for S-0052 noted in STATE.md Next session.

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes — all three approved-plan work units landed. The plan was approved as Part A (Issue #9 fix + P5-01a complete) and Part B (label optimization). Mid-session, a fourth work unit (Issue #10 boot-staleness check) was added per user direction 'no more session cascade for every bug — fix it here'; user confirmed the scope expansion explicitly. All four landed. Boot surface verified end-to-end. Memory saved capturing the no-cascade direction as durable feedback.

side_discoveries.reasoning: False positive — the phrase 'rather than deferred' is a negation ('not deferred'). The audit's negation filter only catches no/not/nothing/no longer within ~12 chars; 'rather than' falls outside that window. The actual semantic is 'fixed in-session, not deferred,' which is the opposite of a deferral.

handoff_entries_resolved: P5-01a Epistemology core — work landed; verifier bug blocks criterion-pass bookkeeping (set at S-0050)
